summary: Analyze production performance, identify bottlenecks, and recommend optimization actions to improve throughput, quality, and cost efficiency.

inputs.name: production_data
inputs.description: Production output, cycle times, downtime, and yield data by line and period.

inputs.name: capacity_data
inputs.description: Equipment capacity, utilization rates, and constraint identification.

inputs.name: quality_metrics
inputs.description: Defect rates, rework costs, and quality hold data.

outputs.name: bottleneck_analysis
outputs.description: Identified bottlenecks ranked by throughput impact.

outputs.name: optimization_plan
outputs.description: Prioritized improvement actions with expected impact and timeline.

outputs.name: performance_baseline
outputs.description: Current state metrics for throughput, OEE, and cost per unit.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is production optimization, not financial forecasting or code deployment.
Require production data and capacity data before bottleneck analysis.
Output must include bottleneck analysis, optimization plan, and performance baseline.

steps.action: Check production and capacity data for completeness and consistency.
Calculate current OEE, throughput rates, and cost per unit.
Analyze process flow to identify constraints and bottlenecks.
Create prioritized improvement plan with expected impact and timeline.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read production data, capacity reports, and quality metrics.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save the optimization plan and performance baseline.

verification.method: Check that bottlenecks are ranked by throughput impact.
Check that optimization actions have expected impact and timeline.
Check that current state metrics are documented.

success_criteria: Bottlenecks are identified and ranked by throughput impact.
Optimization actions are specific with expected impact and timeline.
Current state performance baseline is documented.

rollback.when: If the analysis uses stale production data or invents capacity figures, roll back to verified inputs.
